pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

auth_and_session.required_floor: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
auth_and_session.preflight_binding: mints one short-lived push session bound to one remote identity and one persisted pull base
auth_and_session.mutating_calls: dry-run, apply, and mutating recovery require the push session, canonical push signature, and idempotency key

push_ladder.proof: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
lists the live remote comparison set for planning only
uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
starts with inspect and may block when finish or rollback cannot be proven safe
mutates only when the journal and fresh live hashes prove the action

journal_and_recovery.journal_inspect: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
journal_and_recovery.recover_inspect: must happen before any mutating recovery mode
journal_and_recovery.lease_fence: claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
journal_and_recovery.revalidation: mutating recovery still requires fresh live hashes plus journal evidence

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times

required_invariants: dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
